name: Layout utilities
description: Display and positioning scheme of document elements.

families.name: position
families.description: Sets the positioning scheme of an element.
guidance: Pair position-absolute/fixed/sticky with offset utilities (top-*, left-*) from the position partial.
Prefer position-sticky over position-fixed for in-flow pinned headers — it reserves layout space.

families.name: display
families.description: Sets the display box type of an element.
guidance: display-none removes content from the accessibility tree; use visually-hidden when screen readers should still announce it.
